clone.description: Calling clone() on a default-empty Document returns a new Document instance with identical field values but no shared mutable state
clone.expectedResult: returned Document != original; returned.outputSettings != original.outputSettings; returned.parser != original.parser; returned.baseUri() == original.baseUri(); returned.quirksMode() == original.quirksMode(); returned.location() == original.location()

clone.description: Calling clone() on a Document with modified outputSettings and parser yields an independent clone unaffected by subsequent mutations
clone.expectedResult: returned Document deep copy retains modified settings at clone time; modifications to clone.outputSettings and clone.parser do not reflect in original
pseudocode: // modifications to clone do not affect original
